recent_excerpts: Adobe has released a critical security update for Acrobat and Reader on Windows and macOS to address multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code or read arbitrary fil
Adobe patches 55 vulnerabilities across 11 products, warning that critical flaws in ColdFusion pose the highest risk of exploitation in attacks.
CISA added six vulnerabilities in Fortinet, Microsoft, and Adobe software to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, warning of active in-the-wild attacks requiring urgent patching.
